packageCommands.name: master-edit
packageCommands.command: npm run guard-protected-qbank-files -- --allow-questions-master-edit true && npm run audit-qbank-integrity && npm run build
packageCommands.purpose: Guarded production master edit validation chain.
packageCommands.notes: Guard command plus integrity audit and build; does not itself edit files but validates approved master edits.

packageCommands.name: image-edit
packageCommands.command: npm run guard-protected-qbank-files -- --allow-question-image-edit true && npm run audit-qbank-integrity && npm run build
packageCommands.purpose: Guarded production image metadata edit validation chain.
packageCommands.notes: Guard command plus integrity audit and build; does not itself edit files but validates approved image edits.
